Title: Global Reporting Analyst
Location: Lầu 8, Tòa nhà Sài Gòn ICT, CVPM Quang Trung, Phường Tân Chánh Hiệp, Quận 12, HCM, Floor 8, Saigon ICT Tower, Quang Trung Software City
Job Description:
Principle duties:
- The Global Reporting Analyst will conduct full lifecycle analysis to include requirements, activities, and design, develop analysis and reporting capabilities. You will also monitor performance and quality control plans to identify improvements.
- Optimize and develop processes and make sure that changes are implemented and anchored successfully throughout the entire organization.

Responsibilities:
By Plan, co-ordinate and manage the activities of a highly skilled 24x7x365 Service and Technical Support team. You will work closely with the teams that deliver and support wide range of ICT Service offerings to ensure that the company is delivering overall superior service and support to customers.

Tasks:
1. Prepare reports for internal and external audiences using business analytics reporting tools.
2. Identify, evaluate, and implement external services and tools to support data validation and cleansing.
3. Set up and maintain automated data processes, develop and support reporting processes.
4. Acquire data from multiple data sources and maintain databases/data systems.
5. Liaise with internal and external clients to fully understand data content.
6. Gather, understand, and document detailed business requirements using appropriate tools and techniques.
7. Create data dashboards, graphs and visualizations.
8. Maintain and provide daily/monthly report dashboards to inform stakeholders of customer and/or employee metrics, and supervise accordingly, and hours may vary based on needed coverage across the departments.
9. Work with management to prioritize business and information needs
10. Locate and define new process improvement opportunities.

Title: Site Architect (Kiến Trúc Sư Hiện Trường)
Location: Vinhomes Ocean Park 3, Nghia Tru Ward, Van Giang, Hung Yen, 30th Floor, Capital Place, 29 Lieu Giai, Ba Dinh, Hanoi
Job Description:
• Lead all functions rated to architectural matters at site and supervise team members in coordinating drawings and updating information on project.
• Coordinate with other departments/relevant parties for updates and communications of contractor's shop drawings and construction drawings.
• Monitor all the submission of material, shop drawing, method statement, site progress and quality in terms of finishing items including all Architecture, landscape, Interiors works with good knowledge about finishing material, high quality standard. Monitor in proper system of filling, record and procedure.
• Monitor and coordinate with design consultants and contractors to prevent discrepancies, miss-coordination among Finishing, MEP, Structure … etc drawings and to ensure the drawing and execution on site are comply with Contract document, Sales & purchase (S&P) layout and S&P hand over provision.
• Review and check related MOS (Method Of Statement), RFA (Request For Approval), RFI (Request For Information), MA (Material Approval)/SD (Shop Drawings) during submission and approved process to ensure the submission is comply with contract document and project requirement.
• Supervise and inspect related finishing items on site (Architecture, Landscape, Interiors… ETC) according to approved drawings, method statements… etc to ensure the quality, progress follow project target.
• Prepare daily, weekly report to project manager on related matters. (Submission, approval, progress, quality… etc)
• Monitor EHS at assigned area and other assigned tasks follow actual project condition.

Title: Chuyên Viên Cao Cấp Kỹ Thuật Dự Án (Keo & Chống Thấm)
Company: Công Ty TNHH Công Nghiệp Vĩnh Tường Miền Bắc Việt Nam
Location: Tháp 1, Tầng 17, Capital Place, 29 Liễu Giai, Quận Ba Đình, Hà Nội, Thôn Vĩnh Bảo xã Vĩnh Khúc huyện Văn Giang tỉnh Hưng Yên
Job Description:
• Phụ trách các nhãn hàng: Fosroc, Weber, GCP.
• Đồng hành cùng Đội ngũ bán hàng Dự án, hỗ trợ hoạt đông bán hàng thông qua triển khai hoạt động tư vấn cho khách hàng về sản phẩm và giải pháp về keo dán gạch, chống thấm, hóa chất xây dựng, bao gồm cả biện pháp thi công liên quan.
• Tham gia tư vấn giải pháp chuyên sâu với Specification/ Sales đối với khách hàng Chủ đầu tư, Tư vấn Thiết kế, Tổng thầu, Ban quản lý dự án, Thầu phụ,… và các đối tác liên quan khác trong Dự án.
• Triển khai các hoạt động Đào tạo về sản phẩm, ứng dụng & thi công tới Bộ phận bán hàng & Khách hàng.
• Xây dựng tài liệu kỹ thuật, biện pháp thi công cho các sản phẩm, ứng dụng liên quan
• Phối hợp cùng bộ phận QC, R&D trong việc thực hiện đánh giá chất lượng sản phẩm nội bộ
• Triển khai hoạt động tư vấn biện pháp thi công, hướng dẫn thi công tại công trình cho nhà thầu.
• Hỗ trợ giải quyết khiếu nại hay thắc mắc của khách hàng về sản phẩm và ứng dụng trực tiếp tại công trình.
• Hỗ trợ tư vấn nhà thầu kiểm tra đánh giá chất lượng thi công khi cần thiết.
• Tư vấn hỗ trợ nhà thầu trong hoạt động thử nghiệm mẫu sản phẩm hay ứng dụng theo yêu cầu; hướng dẫn nhà thầu cách thức thử nghiệm đánh giá chất lượng sản phẩm theo đúng tiêu chuẩn; hướng dẫn nhà thầu cách gia công mẫu thử nghiệm theo tiêu chuẩn.
• Phạm vi hoạt đông: Khu vực Miền Bắc
• Báo cáo các hoạt động thuộc phạm vi phụ trách, kèm với các đề xuât kỹ thuật liên quan tới Cấp trên

Title: Marketing Specialist - APAC (1-Year Contractor)
Location: ADM Vietnam Le Loi Boulevard, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
Job Description:
• Manage social media channels (LinkedIn, Facebook for APAC): plan and execute campaigns, create and publish content, schedule posts, respond to comments, run paid ads, optimize SEO, and monitor performance.
• Track, analyze, and report campaign performance with actionable insights and recommendations.
• Ensure compliance with global branding guidelines and data privacy regulations.
• Conduct competitive intelligence: map competitors by country/segment and monitor product claims, pricing, messaging, and channel strategies.
• Gather customer and channel insights through desk research, interviews, and surveys; synthesize pain points and buying behaviors.
• Monitor regulatory and industry developments impacting marketing and product messaging in APAC.
• Organize and distribute marketing collaterals; assist with procurement processes and PR/PO follow-up.
• Prepare concise reports such as country briefs and quarterly trend analyses to inform campaign planning and product positioning.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support marketing initiatives and ensure alignment with regional and global strategies.
• Perform additional tasks as assigned to support APAC daily marketing operations.

Title: [Hai Phong] Assistant Manager, Project Marketing
Location: Hai Phong, 30th Floor, Tower 1, Capital Place, 29 Lieu Giai St., Ngoc Khanh Ward, Ba Dinh District, Hanoi
Job Description:
The key job scopes are:

Local Marketing Execution
- Coordinate with local vendors for advertising, event execution, and activation activities.
- Support implementation of campaigns and monitor performance on site.

Show Village Management
- Oversee daily operations of the show village.
- Ensure high standards of presentation, cleanliness, and customer experience.
- Manage inventory and maintain strict inventory control.
- Proactively propose activation at Show village to attract and enhance visitor’s experience.

Property Management Coordination
- Looking for property management providers (e.g., CBRE, Savills, Visaho, etc.)
- Work closely with property management vendors to ensure smooth operations.
- Monitor operational standards, service quality, and compliance.
- Proactively resolve on-site issues to maintain premium project image.

Project & Site Coordination
- Coordinate with the Project Development team to ensure operational readiness and property quality.
- Act as the key marketing representative on site.

Beyond that, this position also in charge or support the team on other Branding and Marketing matters, including:
- Work with brand consultants in developing brand strategies and identities.
- Collaborate with agencies/suppliers for execution of all marketing collaterals, website, printed materials following brand guidelines.
- Produce creative and innovative contents & visuals for social media channels, PR bookings and printed materials.
- Manage marketing campaigns across online & offline platforms ensuring to reach right target audiences, meet their expectations and build the brand’s awareness/credibility.
- Coordinate and communicate with vendors (consultants, media/event agencies, production houses, suppliers, etc).
- Actively coordinate with internal departments for efficient execution.
- Other ad-hoc tasks as assigned.

Title: Senior Executive, Project Marketing
Location: Tầng 30, Tháp 1, Tòa nhà Capital Place, số 29 Liễu Giai, Phường Ngọc Khánh Quận Ba Đình Hà Nội, 30th Floor, Tower 1, Capital Place, 29 Lieu Giai St., Ngoc Khanh Ward, Ba Dinh District, Hanoi
Job Description:
Mainly in charge of event matters related to Sales & Marketing department, including:
Event Strategy & Execution
- Plan, lead, and execute all project-related events (launch events, sales events, private previews, VIP gatherings, activations, etc.).
- Develop event concepts and provide strong creative direction aligned with luxury brand standards.
- Oversee on-site setup, rehearsals, and full event operations to ensure flawless delivery.
Vendor & Partner Management
- Manage vendors from initial briefing and concept development through execution, evaluation, and payment.
- Select and collaborate with top-tier vendors to ensure premium quality and refined aesthetics.
- Maintain strong quality control throughout all stages of execution.
Budget & Administrative Control
- Manage event budgets efficiently and monitor cost control.
- Handle contracts, documentation, and payment processes in compliance with company procedures.
- Beyond the above responsibilities, this position will also be responsible for, or provide support to the team on, other branding and marketing initiatives, including:
- Work with brand consultants in developing brand strategies and identities.
- Collaborate with agencies/suppliers for execution of all marketing collaterals, website, printed materials following brand guidelines.

Title: Graphic Designer
Location: Naples, Florida, USA, 1178 Broadway New York NY
Job Description:
PixelBull is a U.S.-based creative studio working with growing tech and B2B companies. We
handle digital ads, print materials, landing page layouts, and presentations.
We move fast. We hire fast. We’re a small, fun team with no corporate politics.
You’ll work directly with our Creative Director and help execute creative across multiple
projects.
What You’ll Be Designing
 Digital ad creatives
 Illustrations & Branding
 Landing page layouts (Figma)
 Presentation decks (PowerPoint & Google Slides)
 Print materials (flyers, brochures, booth graphics)
 Social graphics and marketing assets
Required Skills
You must have experience with:
 Figma
 Adobe Illustrator
 Adobe InDesign
 Adobe Photoshop
 PowerPoint
 Google Slides
You must also:
 Have solid typography and layout skills
 Understand basic print production specs (bleed, margins, exports)
 Speak English (written & spoken)
 Be organized and responsive
 Overlap at least 2 hours with New York time
What We’re Looking For
 Someone detail-oriented
 Someone fast and reliable
 Someone who can take direction and execute cleanly
 Someone who enjoys working in a small, growing team
